tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, indicating impaired glucose regulation or prediabetes, despite a low fasting glucose. Elevated creatinine suggests possible reduced kidney function. Other parameters, including electrolytes, urea, and calcium, are within normal limits. Recommend further evaluation of renal function and glycemic control.

display.value: Disorder of kidney due to diabetes mellitus

text.div: Provider Organization: KfH-Nierenzentrum am Klinikum Freising
Provenance for SYNDERAI Synthetic Example Data Resource
Laboratory: Laboratoire Central Européenne, 1000 Brussels, Belgium
